## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (format, lint, unit and component tests, build)
- [ ] Database changes ship with row-level security and pgTAP coverage in the same migration
- [ ] No server-only secret was added to a `VITE_` variable, the client bundle, or logs
- [ ] Shared schemas were updated for any new or changed data contract
- [ ] Docs were updated when architecture, security, schema, or behavior changed
